import asyncio
from sqlalchemy import select, text
from src.backend.db.database import get_async_session
from src.backend.models.registry_model import RegistryModel
from src.backend.models.agent import Agent

async def inspect\(\):
    async for db in get_async_session\(\):
        # Show all registry models with their key fields
        result = await db.execute\(
            select\(RegistryModel.id, RegistryModel.name, RegistryModel.provider,
                   RegistryModel.litellm_prefix, RegistryModel.model_id\)
        \)
        rows = result.all\(\)
        print\('=== REGISTRY MODELS ==='\)
        for r in rows:
            print\(f'  id={str\(r.id\)[:8]}... name={r.name!r} provider={r.provider} prefix={r.litellm_prefix!r} model_id={r.model_id!r}'\)
        
        # Show agents with registry_model_id
        result2 = await db.execute\(
            select\(Agent.id, Agent.name, Agent.provider, Agent.model, Agent.registry_model_id\)
        \)
        rows2 = result2.all\(\)
        print\('\\n=== AGENTS ==='\)
        for r in rows2:
            print\(f'  name={r.name!r} provider={r.provider} model={r.model!r} registry_model_id={str\(r.registry_model_id\)[:8] if r.registry_model_id else None}...'\)

asyncio.run\(inspect\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio, os
os.environ.setdefault\('DATABASE_URL', open\('.env'\).read\(\).split\('DATABASE_URL='\)[1].split\(\)[0] if 'DATABASE_URL' in open\('.env'\).read\(\) else ''\)
import asyncpg

async def inspect\(\):
    dsn = None
    for line in open\('src/backend/.env'\):
        if line.startswith\('DATABASE_URL'\):
            dsn = line.split\('=',1\)[1].strip\(\)
    conn = await asyncpg.connect\(dsn\)
    
    print\('=== REGISTRY MODELS ==='\)
    rows = await conn.fetch\('SELECT id, name, provider, litellm_prefix, model_id FROM mia.registry_models'\)
    for r in rows:
        print\(f'  id={str\(r[\\"id\\"]\)[:8]}... name={r[\\"name\\"]!r} provider={r[\\"provider\\"]} prefix={r[\\"litellm_prefix\\"]!r} model_id={r[\\"model_id\\"]!r}'\)
    
    print\('\\n=== AGENTS ==='\)
    rows2 = await conn.fetch\('SELECT name, provider, model, registry_model_id FROM mia.agents'\)
    for r in rows2:
        rid = str\(r['registry_model_id']\)[:8] if r['registry_model_id'] else None
        print\(f'  name={r[\\"name\\"]!r} provider={r[\\"provider\\"]} model={r[\\"model\\"]!r} reg_id={rid}'\)
    await conn.close\(\)

asyncio.run\(inspect\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
